privacySections.heading: 1. Information Collection
privacySections.body: This system may collect the following information during operation:
items: User identity information: user ID, name, department, and other identifiers required for the approval process.
Application content: business data entered into approval forms (e.g., leave reasons, expense details).
Conversation records: user interactions with the AI assistant, used to improve service quality.
Device information: browser type, operating system version, and other basic device information.

privacySections.heading: 2. Use of Information
privacySections.body: Collected information is used only for the following purposes:
items: Processing approval requests: completing the approval workflow based on submitted information.
Optimizing AI models: using anonymized conversation data to improve the AI assistant's understanding and response capabilities.
Compliance auditing: conducting data audits per internal policies and legal requirements.

privacySections.heading: 3. Information Storage & Security
privacySections.body: All data is stored on enterprise secure servers with the following security measures:
items: Transport encryption: all data transmission uses TLS 1.3 encryption.
Access control: role-based access control (RBAC), only authorized personnel can access data.
Security audits: regular vulnerability scanning and penetration testing.
Data backup: daily automated backups with Recovery Time Objective (RTO) < 4 hours.

privacySections.heading: 4. User Rights
privacySections.body: You have the following rights regarding your data:
items: Right of access: you may request to view your personal data we have collected.
Right of correction: you may request correction of inaccurate personal data.
Right of deletion: subject to legal requirements, you may request deletion of your personal data.
Right of data portability: you may request export of your data in a structured, commonly used format.

privacySections.heading: 5. Cookie Usage
privacySections.body: This system uses necessary cookies to maintain user sessions and language preferences. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party cookies.

privacySections.heading: 6. Contact Information
privacySections.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact:
items: Data Protection Officer: dpo@company.com
IT Support: it-support@company.com

noticeSections.heading: 1. Nature of Service
noticeSections.body: This system ("Approval Assistant") is an AI-powered office approval support tool. The approval suggestions and analysis results provided are for reference only and do not constitute legal, financial, or any form of professional advice. Final approval decisions should be made by authorized personnel based on actual circumstances.

noticeSections.heading: 2. Disclaimer
items: This system generates responses based on AI models and may contain inaccurate or incomplete information. Users should independently verify critical information.
To the fullest extent permitted by law, the system provider assumes no liability for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of this system.
The system may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, upgrades, or force majeure events. The provider does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

noticeSections.heading: 3. Intellectual Property
items: The software code, interface design, trademarks, and documentation of this system are protected by intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction, modification, distribution, or creation of derivative works is prohibited.
The intellectual property rights of user-submitted content and generated approval results shall be governed by the relevant internal enterprise policies.

noticeSections.heading: 4. Usage Rules
noticeSections.body: Users must comply with the following rules when using this system:
items: Do not use the system for illegal activities or submit illegal content.
Do not attempt to bypass the system's security mechanisms or access unauthorized data.
Do not reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to obtain the source code.
Do not use automated tools for large-scale requests or stress testing.

noticeSections.heading: 5. Data Compliance
noticeSections.body: Data collection and processing in this system comply with the following laws and regulations:
items: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China (PIPL)
Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China
Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China
Enterprise internal information security management policies

noticeSections.heading: 6. Changes to Terms
noticeSections.body: This legal notice may be updated from time to time. Updated versions will be published in the system with appropriate notice before taking effect. Continued use of the system constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

noticeSections.heading: 7. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
noticeSections.body: This notice is governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Disputes arising from this notice shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, they shall be submitted to the competent people's court.
